scripts.setup: cd backend && uv sync && cd ../frontend && pnpm install && cd ../llm && swift build -c release
scripts.run: (cd backend && PRM_DEBUG_WORKERS=1 && PRM_DEBUG_API=1 uv run uvicorn main:app --reload) & (cd frontend && pnpm dev)
scripts.run:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
